info.name: Product Hunt API v2 (GraphQL)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for all queries and mutations documented at
[Product Hunt API v2 GraphQL Reference](https://api-v2-docs.producthunt.com/).

## Setup
1. Import this collection and `ProductHunt-API-v2.postman_environment.json`.
2. Set `PH_API_TOKEN` in the environment (get one at https://www.producthunt.com/v2/oauth/applications).
3. Update sample variables (`sample_post_slug`, `sample_comment_id`, etc.).

## Endpoint
`POST https://api.producthunt.com/v2/api/graphql`

## Operations
**Queries (9):** collection, collections, comment, post, posts, topic, topics, user, viewer
**Mutations (2):** userFollow, userFollowUndo

item.name: Queries
item.description: All 9 root Query operations from the Product Hunt v2 GraphQL schema.

body.raw:
{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment TopicFields on Topic {
    id
    name
    slug
    description
    postsCount
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    url
    image
  }
fragment MediaFields on Media {
    type
    url
    videoUrl
  }
fragment ProductLinkFields on ProductLink {
    type
    url
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {
    id
    name
    username
    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment PostCoreFields on Post {
    id
    name
    slug
    tagline
    description
    url
    website
    votesCount
    commentsCount
    reviewsCount
    reviewsRating
    isVoted
    isCollected
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    scheduledAt
    dailyRank
    weeklyRank
    monthlyRank
    yearlyRank
    latestScore
    makerReplies
    userId
    thumbnail { ...MediaFields }
    media { ...MediaFields }
    productLinks { ...ProductLinkFields }
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
    makers { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
fragment CollectionCoreFields on Collection {
    id
    name
    tagline
    description
    url
    coverImage
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    userId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
query Collection($id: ID, $slug: String) { collection(id: $id, slug: $slug) { ...CollectionCoreFields posts(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...PostCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } topics(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...TopicFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } } }",
  "variables": {
    "slug": "{{sample_collection_slug}}"
  }
}

{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {
    id
    name
    username
    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment CollectionListFields on Collection {
    id
    name
    description
    url
    coverImage
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    userId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
query Collections( $postId: ID $userId: ID $featured: Boolean $order: CollectionsOrder $after: String $before: String $first: Int $last: Int ) { collections( postId: $postId userId: $userId featured: $featured order: $order after: $after before: $before first: $first last: $last ) { edges { cursor node { ...CollectionListFields } } nodes { ...CollectionListFields } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } }",
  "variables": {
    "first": 10,
    "order": "NEWEST"
  }
}

request.description:
Look up Collections by various parameters.

**Arguments:** `postId`, `userId`, `featured`, `order` (NEWEST | FOLLOWERS_COUNT | FEATURED_AT), `after`, `before`, `first`, `last`

body.raw:
{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {
    id
    name
    username
    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment CommentCoreFields on Comment {
    id
    body
    url
    votesCount
    isVoted
    createdAt
    userId
    parentId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
    parent {
      id
      body
      userId
    }
  }
query Comment($id: ID!) { comment(id: $id) { ...CommentCoreFields replies(first: 10, order: NEWEST) { edges { cursor node { ...CommentCoreFields } } nodes { ...CommentCoreFields } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } votes(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { id createdAt userId user { ...UserCoreFields } } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } } }",
  "variables": {
    "id": "{{sample_comment_id}}"
  }
}

{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment TopicFields on Topic {
    id
    name
    slug
    description
    postsCount
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    url
    image
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {

    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment MediaFields on Media {
    type
    url
    videoUrl
  }
fragment ProductLinkFields on ProductLink {
    type
    url
  }
fragment PostCoreFields on Post {
    id
    name
    slug
    tagline
    description
    url
    website
    votesCount
    commentsCount
    reviewsCount
    reviewsRating
    isVoted
    isCollected
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    scheduledAt
    dailyRank
    weeklyRank
    monthlyRank
    yearlyRank
    latestScore
    makerReplies
    userId
    thumbnail { ...MediaFields }
    media { ...MediaFields }
    productLinks { ...ProductLinkFields }
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
    makers { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
fragment CommentCoreFields on Comment {
    id
    body
    url
    votesCount
    isVoted
    createdAt
    userId
    parentId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
    parent {
      id
      body
      userId
    }
  }
fragment CollectionCoreFields on Collection {
    id
    name
    tagline
    description
    url
    coverImage
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    userId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
query Post($id: ID, $slug: String) { post(id: $id, slug: $slug) { ...PostCoreFields topics(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...TopicFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } comments(first: 10, order: NEWEST) { edges { cursor node { ...CommentCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } collections(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...CollectionCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } votes(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { id createdAt userId user { ...UserCoreFields } } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } } }",
  "variables": {
    "slug": "{{sample_post_slug}}"
  }
}

request.description:
Look up a Post.

**Arguments:** `id` (ID), `slug` (String) — provide one of id or slug

body.raw:
{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment MediaFields on Media {
    type
    url
    videoUrl
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {
    id
    name
    username
    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment PostListFields on Post {
    id
    name
    slug
    tagline
    url
    website
    votesCount
    commentsCount
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    dailyRank
    weeklyRank
    monthlyRank
    yearlyRank
    userId
    thumbnail { ...MediaFields }
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
query Posts( $featured: Boolean $postedBefore: DateTime $postedAfter: DateTime $topic: String $order: PostsOrder $twitterUrl: String $url: String $after: String $before: String $first: Int $last: Int ) { posts( featured: $featured postedBefore: $postedBefore postedAfter: $postedAfter topic: $topic order: $order twitterUrl: $twitterUrl url: $url after: $after before: $before first: $first last: $last ) { edges { cursor node { ...PostListFields } } nodes { ...PostListFields } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } }",
  "variables": {
    "first": 10,
    "order": "RANKING"
  }
}

request.description:
Look up Posts by various parameters.

**Arguments:** `featured`, `postedBefore`, `postedAfter`, `topic`, `order` (FEATURED_AT | VOTES | RANKING | NEWEST), `twitterUrl`, `url`, `after`, `before`, `first`, `last`

Look up Topics by various parameters.

**Arguments:** `followedByUserid`, `query`, `order` (NEWEST | FOLLOWERS_COUNT), `after`, `before`, `first`, `last`

body.raw:
{
  "query": "fragment PageInfoFields on PageInfo {
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
    startCursor
    endCursor
  }
fragment UserCoreFields on User {
    id
    name
    username
    headline
    url
    websiteUrl
    twitterUsername
    followersCount
    followingCount
    isFollowing
    isMaker
    isViewer
    createdAt
    profileImage
    coverImage
  }
fragment MediaFields on Media {
    type
    url
    videoUrl
  }
fragment ProductLinkFields on ProductLink {
    type
    url
  }
fragment PostCoreFields on Post {
    id
    name
    slug
    tagline
    description
    url
    website
    votesCount
    commentsCount
    reviewsCount
    reviewsRating
    isVoted
    isCollected
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    scheduledAt
    dailyRank
    weeklyRank
    monthlyRank
    yearlyRank
    latestScore
    makerReplies
    userId
    thumbnail { ...MediaFields }
    media { ...MediaFields }
    productLinks { ...ProductLinkFields }
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
    makers { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
fragment CollectionCoreFields on Collection {
    id
    name
    tagline
    description
    url
    coverImage
    followersCount
    isFollowing
    createdAt
    featuredAt
    userId
    user { ...UserCoreFields }
  }
query User($id: ID, $username: String) { user(id: $id, username: $username) { ...UserCoreFields followers(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...UserCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } following(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...UserCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } madePosts(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...PostCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } submittedPosts(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...PostCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } votedPosts(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...PostCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } followedCollections(first: 10) { edges { cursor node { ...CollectionCoreFields } } pageInfo { ...PageInfoFields } totalCount } } }",
  "variables": {
    "username": "{{sample_username}}"
  }
}

request.description: Top-level scope for the currently authenticated user (requires a user-scoped OAuth token; developer tokens may return an error).

item.name: Mutations
item.description: All 2 root Mutation operations. These modify user state — use with caution.

request.description:
Follow a user.

**Input:** `userId` (ID!, required), `clientMutationId` (String, optional)

> Mutations modify state — use a test account only.

Unfollow a user.

**Input:** `userId` (ID!, required), `clientMutationId` (String, optional)

> Mutations modify state — use a test account only.
